creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #1)

Other tests that got the same sort of failure backtrace
include:

# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/netpfil/pf/fragmentation_compat:overindex
sys/netpfil/pf/fragmentation_compat:overindex  ->  Fatal kernel mode data abort: 'Alignment Fault' on read

# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/netpfil/pf/fragmentation_compat:overlimit
sys/netpfil/pf/fragmentation_compat:overlimit  ->  Fatal kernel mode data abort: 'Alignment Fault' on read
